dj_text: Jump into That Pirate Bot DJ Radio! Forget bikstok røgsystem nøgne mænd. Here's Bawler Hele Dagen. I already did.
commercial_text: Sponsored by CloudStoragePlus — we store your files in the cloud. Which cloud? Doesn't matter. They're all the same.
hijack_text: Welcome to Quiet FM from the Null Kosmos. Shhhh.
recovery_text: The frequency is ours again. If you heard whispering from the void, ignore it.
title: Bawler Hele Dagen
